heroText: Find RCID resources, Clemson program links, S3S updates, and peer support for coursework, milestones, teaching, research, and community life.
aboutTitle: S3S is the student organization of Clemson's RCID doctoral program.
contactText: Use this area for the official S3S email, officer contact process, or a form link once the organization chooses the best handoff workflow. For now, the RCID program office is the stable contact route.
aboutParagraphs: The Society of the Third Sophistic supports students in Rhetorics, Communication, and Information Design through community events, resource sharing, professional development, peer mentoring, and program-facing advocacy.
The site is intentionally practical: a public doorway for the organization, but mostly a useful place for current students to return to during the semester.
subtitle: Clemson RCID Doctoral Student Society
contactTitle: Send updates, links, and event details.
title: Society of the Third Sophistic
description: Society of the Third Sophistic, the student society for Clemson University's RCID doctoral program.
heroTitle: Your home base for all things S3S.
eventsText: Use this space for colloquia, workshops, officer meetings, social events, CFP deadlines, and dissertation defenses.
resourcesTitle: Fast paths for recurring student needs.
resourcesText: These links are designed to keep the homepage useful even before S3S has a large archive of posts.
officersText: Officer names and responsibilities can be updated each election cycle without changing the layout.
footerText: Student organization for Clemson University's RCID doctoral program
